ksa_text: Design, build, and maintain automated data ingestion pipelines from source systems to the data platform, including schema mapping, transformation logic, error handling, and data quality validation at ingestion points.

dcwf.top_element_label: Provide recommendations on new database technologies and architectures.

nice.top_element_label: Recommend data structures for use in the production of reports

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-T-003 (DA, Task) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4216 is insufficient to establish relevance to senior-level analytics and business intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.422, nist_ai_rmf=0.408, dcwf=0.397) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4216 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DA-domain KSA DA-T-003 (composite 0.4216) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4216 for DA domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DCWF 421 and DDAT Data Architect profiles; DA competencies at awareness level appear in senior IC data analyst role profiles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Senior Data Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DA domain KSA at composite 0.4216 is not a standard requirement for Senior Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4216, domain DA, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
